departments.name: Cardiology

departments.name: Neurology
departments.description: Comprehensive diagnostics for the brain, nervous system development, and spinal care.

doctors.name: Dr. Elena Vasquez
doctors.bio: Board-certified cardiologist with over 15 years perfecting non-invasive cardiovascular procedures.

doctors.bio: Pioneering researcher in neural connectivity and stroke prevention therapies.

doctors.bio: Holistic juvenile healthcare practitioner specializing in wellness growth metrics.

doctors.bio: Expert joint restoration consultant and sports reconstructive therapist.

doctors.name: Dr. Alistair Vance
doctors.bio: Expert in interventional cardiology, focusing on advanced non-surgical valve replacements and coronary stent placement.

doctors.name: Dr. Kenji Sato
doctors.bio: Highly acclaimed pediatrician and infant developmental delay oncologist with a focus on early speech support.

doctors.bio: Board-certified neurologist specializing in neuro-ophthalmology, vestibular diagnostics, and optical nerve health.
